meaning: n.<口>要人,有重大影响的人
examples: One retired bigwig believes the threat is hollow.
Another lia bigwig and director of Dalia Advisory, Rajab Mahmoud Layas, also seems to be in Libya.
An intern for a bigwig fashion designer, she was once dispatched to Miami to procure a heap of Italian cashmere.
Hollywood bigwig David Geffen, meanwhile, is reported to have bid on the Los Angeles Times.
One bigwig says the rules will make India a harder place to operate in than China.
